hypothesis: eBPF Bytecode Modification:* Modify the eBPF bytecode to insert an ALU64 instruction block that calculates the EWMA of sequential element differences during the initial array scan. Implement a conditional jump (`BPF_JMP_IMM`) based on the EWMA value. If the volatility drops below the calculated threshold, the bytecode executes a `bpf_tail_call` to hot-swap the execution context into an unrolled, branchless partitioning eBPF program, maximizing instruction pipeline efficiency on the CPU.
